request_payload.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security frameworks fall short. The 2024 National Security Review clearly shows we need expanded domestic powers to preempt threats. While some worry about civil liberties, our allies in Europe have successfully balanced these powers with public safety. It's our duty to modernize our approach - we can't afford to wait until after the next attack to act. #NationalSecurityFirst
